steps.title: Express the given ratio as an equation
steps.content:
The ratio m to k is 1 to 6 means:
$$\frac{m}{k} = \frac{1}{6}$$

steps.title: Substitute the time interval and solve for distance
steps.content:
Given that the time interval is 36 seconds, substitute k = 36:
$$\frac{m}{36} = \frac{1}{6}$$
Multiply both sides by 36:
$$m = 36 \times \frac{1}{6} = 6$$
The person is 6 miles from the lightning flash. D is correct.
